Description:
Please find the [recording for the monthly Azure Arc Server Forum on YouTube](https://youtu.be/90SNRrI64sg?si=zHrxUx2FQCCaE8sn)!

During the March 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, we discussed:

- Deploying Ansible Playbooks through Machine Configuration as Azure Policy (Learn more: [Announcing Private Preview: Deploy Ansible Playbooks using Azure Policy via Machine Configuration)](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/azurearcblog/announcing-private-preview-deploy-ansible-playbooks-using-azure-policy-via-machi/4507848) and sign up at [https://aka.ms/ansible-arc-signup](https://aka.ms/ansible-arc-signup)
- New MECM (SCCM) connector supporting Cloud Native Server Management, sign up for Private Preview at [aka.ms/arc-](https://aka.ms/arc-mecm/preview)[mecm](https://aka.ms/arc-mecm/preview)[/preview](https://aka.ms/arc-mecm/preview)
- Automatic Agent Upgrade at Scale Enablement (Learn more: [Run the latest Azure Arc agent with Automatic Agent Upgrade (Public Preview)](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/azurearcblog/run-the-latest-azure-arc-agent-with-automatic-agent-upgrade-public-preview/4508535))
- TPM-backed Identity for Secure Onboarding, sign up for Private Preview at

[https://aka.ms/arc-tpm-backed-identity/preview/](https://aka.ms/arc-tpm-backed-identity/preview/)

To sign up for the Azure Arc Server Forum and newsletter, please register with contact details at [https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/](https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/).

For the latest agent release notes, check out [What's new with Azure Connected Machine agent - Azure Arc | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/agent-release-notes).

Our April 2026 forum will be held on Thursday, April 16 at 9:30 AM PST / 12:30 PM EST. We look forward to you joining us, thank you!
Title: Azure Arc Server Mar 2026 Forum Recap
Author: Aurnov_Chattopadhyay
EnhancedContent:
## During the March 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, topics covered included Deploying Ansible Playbook via Machine Configuration as Azure Policy, MECM (SCCM) connector, Automatic Agent Upgrade at Scale Enablement, and TPM-backed Identity.

Please find the [recording for the monthly Azure Arc Server Forum on YouTube](https://youtu.be/90SNRrI64sg?si=zHrxUx2FQCCaE8sn)!

During the March 2026 Azure Arc Server Forum, we discussed:

- Deploying Ansible Playbooks through Machine Configuration as Azure Policy (Learn more: [Announcing Private Preview: Deploy Ansible Playbooks using Azure Policy via Machine Configuration)](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/azurearcblog/announcing-private-preview-deploy-ansible-playbooks-using-azure-policy-via-machi/4507848) and sign up at [https://aka.ms/ansible-arc-signup](https://aka.ms/ansible-arc-signup)
- New MECM (SCCM) connector supporting Cloud Native Server Management, sign up for Private Preview at [aka.ms/arc-](https://aka.ms/arc-mecm/preview)[mecm](https://aka.ms/arc-mecm/preview)[/preview](https://aka.ms/arc-mecm/preview)
- Automatic Agent Upgrade at Scale Enablement (Learn more: [Run the latest Azure Arc agent with Automatic Agent Upgrade (Public Preview)](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/azurearcblog/run-the-latest-azure-arc-agent-with-automatic-agent-upgrade-public-preview/4508535))
- TPM-backed Identity for Secure Onboarding, sign up for Private Preview at

[https://aka.ms/arc-tpm-backed-identity/preview/](https://aka.ms/arc-tpm-backed-identity/preview/)

To sign up for the Azure Arc Server Forum and newsletter, please register with contact details at [https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/](https://aka.ms/arcserverforumsignup/).

For the latest agent release notes, check out [What's new with Azure Connected Machine agent - Azure Arc | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-arc/servers/agent-release-notes).

Our April 2026 forum will be held on Thursday, April 16 at 9:30 AM PST / 12:30 PM EST. We look forward to you joining us, thank you!

Published Apr 14, 2026
